defaultSeo.metaTitle: Katiba Na Mia - Constitutional Education for All Kenyans
defaultSeo.metaDescription: Empowering every Kenyan with constitutional knowledge through debates, literacy tests, and music. A 47-week journey across all counties.

global.siteDescription: Constitutional Education Movement led by Ng'ang'a Muigai

blocks.title: Ng'ang'a Muigai
blocks.body: Knowledge is power. Let's liberate our future generations from the shackles of ignorance.

## Constitutional Education at the Grassroots

Katiba Na Mia is a civic education movement led by Ng'ang'a Muigai. We simplify Kenya's Constitution for citizens in both Kiswahili and English, committed to taking constitutional knowledge directly to the people at the grassroots level.

### Our Mission

We conduct civic education and public engagement on constitutional matters across Kenya. Our mission is to make the Constitution accessible and empower citizens with knowledge of their rights and responsibilities through community engagement.

### Our Approach

- Interactive debates on constitutional matters
- Katiba literacy tests
- Music performances for mobilization
- Community engagement at grassroots level

articles.title: Launch of Katiba Shuleni 2026 Petition
articles.description: We are pushing for the Constitution of Kenya to be established as a full mandatory and examinable subject in the basic education curriculum.

blocks.body:
## Katiba Shuleni 2026

We are excited to announce the launch of our parliamentary petition to make the Constitution of Kenya a mandatory, examinable subject in schools from primary through tertiary education.

### Why This Matters

Constitutional literacy is the foundation of democratic participation. When citizens understand their rights and responsibilities, they can actively engage in governance and hold leaders accountable.

### How You Can Help

1. Sign the petition on Change.org
2. Share with your network
3. Join our county tours
4. Support the movement

blocks.title: Ng'ang'a Muigai
blocks.body: An informed citizenry is the backbone of any thriving democracy.

articles.title: 47 Counties Tour: Week 1 in Mombasa
articles.description: Our first week of the 47-week constitutional education tour kicks off in Mombasa County.

blocks.body:
## Mombasa County Tour

We are thrilled to begin our 47-week journey across all counties in Kenya. Week 1 takes us to Mombasa County, where we will engage with citizens at various action areas.

### Schedule

- Wednesday: Bunge la Mwananchi at Treasury Square
- Thursday: Bodaboda stages and Jua Kali sectors
- Friday: Higher learning institutions

### Activities

- Constitutional debates
- Katiba literacy tests
- Distribution of Katiba Made Familiar books
- Music performances

articles.title: Understanding the KAMAU Agenda
articles.description: A deep dive into the five pillars of the KAMAU Agenda and how they will transform Kenya.

blocks.body:
## The KAMAU Agenda

The KAMAU Agenda represents our commitment to systemic reform across five critical areas:

### K - Katiba (Constitution)
Making the Constitution a mandatory subject in schools.

### A - Masomo (Education)
Establishing infrastructure standards for all public schools.

### M - Afya (Health)
Creating a chronic diseases fund separate from the health budget.

### A - Uchaguzi (Elections)
Reforming the recall process for MPs.

### U - Ugatuzi (Devolution)
Establishing a devolution prototype for all counties.
